guidelines.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tight text-navy leading-none
guidelines.h2: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-light tracking-tight text-navy leading-tight

layouts.spacing: py-24 sm:py-32 px-6 sm:px-12 max-w-7xl mx-auto

guidelines.hero_reveal: Masked line-by-line reveal (overflow-hidden wrapper, text slides up from y: 100% to 0).
guidelines.scroll_momentum: Use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling.
guidelines.parallax: Subtle parallax on hero portrait image on scroll.
guidelines.hover_states: Images scale slightly (scale-105) on hover with a slow transition. Buttons have a slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow increase.

nav.description: Sticky glassmorphism header. Left: 'FC' Logo (Gold on Navy circle). Right: Nav links and 'Agendar' pill button.

hero.description: Kinetic Hero with large bold typography, line-by-line reveal. Real photography of lawyer treated deliberately with spotlight or clipped frames.
elements: Headline: 'Excelência em Direito de Família & Sucessões'
Subheadline: 'Protegendo o seu legado com discrição, empatia e estratégia.'
Image: Female lawyer portrait with subtle parallax.

marquee.description: Slow editorial marquee acting as a section divider.
marquee.content: DIREITO DE FAMÍLIA • INVENTÁRIO • PLANEJAMENTO SUCESSÓRIO • PREVIDENCIÁRIO • DIREITO DE FAMÍLIA • INVENTÁRIO •
marquee.style: bg-navy text-cream py-6 text-2xl font-heading tracking-widest overflow-hidden whitespace-nowrap

manifesto.description: Numbered manifesto chapters detailing history and differentiators.
manifesto.style: Grid layout where numbers are massive and serif, text is refined sans.

services.description: 3 Elegant cards for main practice areas.

cards.title: Divórcio & Família
cards.description: Atuação humanizada em divórcios, guarda, pensão e partilha de bens.

cards.title: Inventário & Sucessões
cards.description: Planejamento sucessório, testamentos e inventários ágeis.

cards.title: Previdenciário
cards.description: Aposentadorias e benefícios com segurança e eficiência.

services.style: Cards with background_cream or surface_white, rounded-3xl, image on top, padding p-8.

gallery.description: Editorial clipped frames showing office and conceptual imagery. Asymmetric bento grid.

location_and_hours.description: Grid layout splitting Business Hours text and Embedded Google Maps iframe (Lorena-SP).

testimonials.description: Google Reviews showcased in an elegant masonry or sliding carousel layout.

faq.description: Clean accordion style, 1px bottom borders, elegant open/close animation.

footer.description: Massive typography for branding, subtle social links, completely dark (Navy) with Cream text.

hero_lawyer.description: Professional female lawyer portrait for the hero section.

hero_lawyer_alt.description: Alternative female lawyer standing with arms crossed.

service_family.description: Conceptual image for Family Law / Divórcio & Família (can double for Previdenciário).

service_succession.description: Fountain pen on document for Inventário & Sucessões.

gallery_office.description: Luxury modern law office interior for gallery.

gallery_justice.description: Gold scales of justice for gallery.

gallery_travel.description: Classic Parisian architecture for travel/editorial imagery in gallery.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Framer Motion to animate the hero section with a signature on-load masked line-by-line reveal.
Implement Lenis for smooth scrolling across the entire page.
Ensure 'Cormorant Garamond' is applied to all Headings (H1-H6) and 'Manrope' to all body text. Add them to Tailwind config.
Strictly follow the color palette: Deep Navy (#0C2D4E), Warm Gold (#B8860B), Brass (#D4B78D), and Cream (#F5F1E8) for background.
Ensure sections have generous padding (py-24 or py-32) to let the design breathe.
Never center-align large blocks of text; left-align for elegance. Center alignment is only permitted for short section titles or CTAs.
Ensure the hero image uses a parallax effect.
The gallery should be an asymmetrical bento grid with images treated as editorial clipped frames (rounded corners, subtle zoom on hover).
All interactive elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="hero-whatsapp-button"`).
DO NOT use a fully transparent background for the header. Always use the specified glassmorphism style (`backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F5F1E8]/80`).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., `transition: all`). Always add transitions for specific properties.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, i.e., do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the CSS file.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects.
